case_title: CITY HOUSING, INC. VS. JANICE STARGEN et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT STARGEN, JANICE ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY HOUSING, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STARGEN, JANICE DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 909 GEARY ST., #320 SF, CA $1,126.55 RENT, $115.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,241.85, LEASE FORFEITED, PER DIEM HOLD OVER OF $15.33; SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
COURT TRIAL ON AUG-04-2003 OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT ENTERED.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY HOUSING, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT STARGEN, JANICE DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT STARGEN, JANICE ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES

MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR AUG-04-2003 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR COURT TRIAL ON AUG-04-2003 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 206. DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR AT THE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. JURY DEMAND STRICKEN. TO COURT TRIAL. PETER HADIARIS, PRO TEM JUDGE; D. CARTER, CLERK; NO REPORTER.
